description: Enforce that each hex dev pipeline phase validates upstream artifacts exist before executing, replacing silent skips with blocking gate dialogs

specs.description: Session fields are written to JSON when each TUI phase completes
specs.given: A hex dev session running the workplan phase that successfully creates a workplan file
specs.when: The workplan phase completes and advances to swarm
specs.then: session.workplan_path is set to the workplan file path and session.save() is called before advancing

specs.description: Code phase executes when workplan_path is set
specs.given: A hex dev session where session.workplan_path is Some(path) pointing to a valid workplan
specs.then: Code generation proceeds — agents are dispatched for swarm tasks, no skip occurs

specs.description: Code phase shows blocking gate when workplan_path is None
specs.given: A hex dev session where session.workplan_path is None
specs.then: A blocking PreconditionError gate dialog is shown: 'No workplan found. Return to Workplan phase?' with options [Retry | Abort]. The phase does NOT silently advance to Validate.

specs.description: Swarm phase shows blocking gate when workplan cannot be parsed
specs.given: A hex dev session where session.workplan_path is Some but the file does not parse as valid JSON
specs.then: A blocking gate is shown: 'Workplan file is invalid. Return to Workplan phase?' The phase does NOT advance with a 'best-effort' comment.

specs.description: ADR skip does not cascade into workplan auto-skip
specs.given: A hex dev session where the user selects GateResult::Skip at the ADR gate
specs.when: The pipeline advances to Workplan phase
specs.then: The workplan phase pre-condition check finds session.adr_path=None and presents a gate: 'No ADR created. Continue without ADR?' with explicit [Confirm | Return to ADR]. It does not silently auto-skip.

specs.description: GateResult::Skip at Commit sets Paused not Completed
specs.given: A hex dev session in the Commit phase where the user selects Skip
specs.then: session.status is set to SessionStatus::Paused (not Completed). hex dev list shows the session as paused with a resume hint.

specs.description: advance_to_next_phase at Commit runs the gate, not bypasses it
specs.given: A hex dev session advancing past the Commit phase via keyboard shortcut
specs.then: handle_commit_gate() is called to present the commit review gate. SessionStatus::Completed is only set after GateResult::Approved.

specs.description: finalize_session(Approved) sets Completed only when swarm tasks were done
specs.given: A hex dev session with swarm_id set and swarm tasks_completed > 0
specs.then: session.status = SessionStatus::Completed and the session is saved

specs.description: finalize_session(Approved) fails when swarm has 0 tasks completed
specs.given: A hex dev session with swarm_id set and 0 swarm tasks completed
specs.then: An error is returned: 'Cannot complete: 0/N swarm tasks completed'. session.status remains InProgress.

specs.description: hex dev list surfaces Incomplete sessions with warning
specs.given: A session with status=Completed but completed_steps is empty and quality_result is None (legacy incomplete session)
specs.then: The session shows status 'incomplete' (not 'completed') with a hint: 'phases skipped — no code generated'

specs.description: Session fields are not overwritten by later phases
specs.given: A session where session.adr_path was set in a previous run
specs.when: The ADR phase is re-run and produces a different path
specs.then: session.adr_path is updated to the new path (not silently ignored)

specs.description: Pre-condition gate is not shown for phases that have no upstream requirement
specs.given: A hex dev session starting fresh at the ADR phase
specs.then: No error is returned — ADR is the first phase and has no upstream dependency
